---
name: Missing or Better Worked Example
about: Suggest an additional or improved worked example for one of the layers
title: "[EXAMPLE] "
labels: enhancement, worked-example
assignees: ''
---

## Which layer

- [ ] Layer 1 (IDENTITY.example.md)
- [ ] Layer 2 (rules/example.md or rules/example-testing.md)
- [ ] Layer 4 (PROJECT_TEMPLATE.md / a new filled CLAUDE.md example)
- [ ] Cross-cutting (MIGRATION.md, README cascade diagram, etc.)

## What's missing or could be better

<!-- Describe the gap. Examples:
- "There's no rules/ example showing async-pattern discipline"
- "IDENTITY.example.md's Jordan Chen persona is web-dev-focused; a backend/infra example would help"
- "MIGRATION.md doesn't show what a giant pre-existing CLAUDE.md actually looks like before/after"
-->

## What domain / shape would the example cover

<!--
Worked examples ship in different domains intentionally — the scaffold's
no-philosophy stance means each example must demonstrate FORMAT, not
prescribe content. What's the domain you'd add, and how would it
break the implicit assumption that examples must follow one shape?
-->

## Are you proposing the content?

- [ ] Yes — I'll open a PR if approved
- [ ] No — I'm flagging the gap for someone else
- [ ] I have a draft I'd share if asked

## Reference / source

<!-- If your example is adapted from a real workflow, confirm it's
generic enough to ship as a worked example (no client-identifying
details, no philosophy that the scaffold avoids). -->
